overview: Sam Combo is a quadrants Modern deck that leverages mana acceleration and card selection to assemble lethal sequences. By combining Birthing Ritual and Cauldron Familiar, the deck rapidly generates resources to cast Chord of Calling and find its win conditions. The strategy focuses on outpacing opponents through efficient spell sequencing and land search.
win_conditions: Accelerate into multiple Chord of Calling targets to overwhelm defenses
Use Cauldron Familiar to search for combo enabler lands and Birthing Ritual to pay for high-cost finishers
Deploy a sequence of cheap spells and mana dorks to close the game before opponent interaction resolves

keep_criteria: Hands containing Cauldron Familiar and at least two lands
Hands with Birthing Ritual and a cheap spell or Chord of Calling
Hands that can play a turn-one land and a turn-two acceleration spell
Keep hands with 2-3 lands (preferably basics or duals that fetch basics), Birthing Ritual, Cauldron Familiar, and Chord of Calling.
Keep any hand with Birthing Ritual + Cauldron Familiar + 2 lands.
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking mana acceleration or land search
Hands with only high-cost spells and no early interaction
Hands missing Chord of Calling or combo enablers in a 4-card hand
Mulligan hands with 0-1 lands, multiple copies of Birthing Ritual/Cauldron Familiar without lands, or hands lacking early interaction/draw spells.

early_game: Play lands and immediately activate Cauldron Familiar to search for optimal mana bases
Cast cheap spells to establish board presence and protect acceleration
Hold back mana to respond to early disruption if possible
Turn 1: Play a land, cast Birthing Ritual for 1 to fetch Cauldron Familiar.
Turn 2: Cast Cauldron Familiar, let it die to fetch a second creature (often a mana dork, artifact, or wincon piece), or cast Chord of Calling for 1 to fetch a specific threat.
Sequence lands to ensure you can cast Birthing Ritual on turn 1 and follow up with Cauldron Familiar on turn 2.
mid_game: Chain Birthing Ritual with Chord of Calling to find multiple threats or finishers
Use Cauldron Familiar repeatedly to fix mana and find combo pieces
Apply pressure while searching for the final components of the combo
Prioritize keeping Birthing Ritual and Cauldron Familiar in play as long as possible to maximize value.
Use Chord of Calling sparingly for key pieces.
Manage graveyard by avoiding unnecessary sacrifice outlets unless necessary for the combo.
Keep hand size high by using draw spells or ritual effects.
Commit threats only when you have a clear path to the win condition or can protect them with removal.
Hold back Birthing Ritual/Cauldron Familiar if the opponent has sweepers or targeted removal.
late_game: Execute the full combo sequence to generate lethal damage or untouchable board states
Flood the board with Chord of Calling targets to exhaust opponent removal
Maintain card advantage through continuous land search and spell recursion
Birthing Ritual + Cauldron Familiar + Chord of Calling to fetch a win condition like Karn, the Great Creator, Thrun, Breaker of Silence, Goblin Welder, or a massive creature.
Once assembled, untap lands and cast Birthing Ritual repeatedly to generate infinite value or win directly.
Go all-in when you have a clear win condition in hand or can assemble it in one turn, and the opponent has no immediate removal or sweepers.
Also commit when you're ahead on board and can close out the game before the opponent stabilizes.

key_cards.name: Chord of Calling
key_cards.notes: Cast to search for multiple combo pieces or finishers; prioritize targets that synergize with mana acceleration

key_cards.name: Birthing Ritual
key_cards.notes: Use to pay for Chord of Calling or high-cost combo enablers; chain with Cauldron Familiar for maximum efficiency

key_cards.name: Cauldron Familiar
key_cards.notes: Play early to search for dual lands or combo-specific lands; use its tap ability to fix mana for Birthing Ritual and Chord of Calling

sequencing_tips: Activate Cauldron Familiar before playing lands to maximize search efficiency
Cast Birthing Ritual immediately before Chord of Calling to ensure you can pay for multiple targets
Hold up mana for potential counterspells or removal before committing to the full combo sequence
Common mistakes include overcommitting Birthing Ritual/Cauldron Familiar without a win condition, miscounting mana for Chord of Calling, and failing to track opponent's removal.

Unique interactions include using Birthing Ritual to fetch basic lands for shock lands or fetch lands, and using Cauldron Familiar's death trigger to fetch creatures with mana value 1 for additional value.

matchups.advice: Prioritize early Cauldron Familiar and cheap spells to stabilize; use Birthing Ritual to accelerate into board wipes or finishers before they close out the game.
Play around counterspells by holding up mana; use Chord of Calling to find multiple threats and overwhelm their hand size.
Race their value engines by accelerating quickly; use Cauldron Familiar to find lands that enable combo turns before they stabilize.
Disrupt their setup with early interaction; race them by executing your combo sequence as quickly as possible.

Use Birthing Ritual and Cauldron Familiar as instant-speed threats or value engines. Cast Chord of Calling in response to counterspells if possible, or use protection spells. Sequence spells to beat countermagic (e.g., cast Birthing Ritual, then Cauldron Familiar, then Chord of Calling in separate turns).
Use early interaction to slow down their mana development. Prioritize removing key ramp creatures or artifacts. Use Chord of Calling to fetch removal or protection.
Win by going first, having better sequencing, or having more interaction. Use Chord of Calling to fetch removal or protection. Prioritize breaking their combo pieces before they can assemble theirs.

common_threats: Watch for sweepers (e.g., Wrath of God, Day of Judgment), targeted removal (e.g., Path to Exile, Swords to Plowshares), and combo pieces that can end the game quickly.
Note when opponents tap out for counterspells or protection spells.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype: Sam Combo, Format: modern, Colors: W/U/B/G, Signature cards: Chord of Calling, Birthing Ritual, Cauldron Familiar

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards: Chord of Calling, Birthing Ritual, Cauldron Familiar

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Signature cards: Chord of Calling, Birthing Ritual, Cauldron Familiar
